title: 'Last Chance to Surrender Before April 29': PM Modi Warns TMC 'Goons, Syndicates' at West Bengal Rally
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi criticized the Trinamool Congress (TMC) for corruption, giving a "last chance" for TMC members to surrender by April 29 ahead of the 2026 West Bengal elections. He promised women free rations and Rs 36,000 annually with the 'Maatri Shakti Bharosa Card' if the BJP wins
